articles.title: Kerala Lottery Karunya Plus KN-625 result out today (28-05-2026); Rs 1 crore prize winning number and full list here
articles.description: Kerala Lottery Results Today: The Karunya Plus KN-625 lottery results are announced today at 3 PM. Ticket holders can check their numbers for a chance to win prizes. The top prize is ₹1 crore. Smaller prizes are also available. Winners can claim their rewards from retailers or lottery offices. The Kerala State Lotteries Department ensures transparency in the process.

articles.title: Did Sharaddha Kapoor and beau Rahul Mody tease their next film title? Couple shoot dance video amid script read - WATCH
articles.description: Shraddha Kapoor's late-night dance video with beau Rahul Mody has fueled speculation about their upcoming film. A glimpse of a script on Mody's lap, featuring the word 'Dear,' hints at the project's title. Kapoor previously confirmed a film with Mody revolving around start-ups and hustle culture, promising a challenging new role.

articles.title: Unusual summer pollution spike highlights Aravallis’ diminished role as dust barrier
articles.description: The spike in pollution brings back into focus the destruction of the Aravalli ranges, which for centuries acted as a natural barrier.

articles.title: Bhubaneswar to host 2028 Asian Indoor Athletics Championships
articles.description: Bhubaneswar is set to host the 2028 Asian Indoor Athletics Championships, marking its fourth major international athletics event in four years. This follows the city's successful bid for the 2028 World Athletics Indoor Championships. The announcement, made in Hong Kong, also revealed Chandigarh will host the 2027 Asian Relay Championships. Officials anticipate a significant boost to sports in India.

articles.title: HAL Sidelined As Private Players Enter Race For India’s First Stealth Fighter AMCA
articles.description: India’s defence aerospace sector, the government has opened the Advanced Medium Combat Aircraft programme to private industry for the first time, keeping HAL out of the initial prototype competition.

articles.title: Planned Parenthood thumbs nose at FDA by selling abortion pills to women before they're pregnant
articles.description: Planned Parenthood has begun prescribing abortion pills to women before they get pregnant, defying the Food and Drug Administration's safety protocol and heightening concerns about the drugs being used by bad actors to induce non-consensual abortions.

articles.title: Fake mango alert: How to identify artificially ripened mangoes at home with quick tests
articles.description: As summer arrives, Indian markets face a surge of mangoes, including artificially ripened ones using harmful chemicals like calcium carbide. The FSSAI advises buyers to check color, smell, firmness, and appearance to identify these fruits. Consuming chemically ripened mangoes can lead to various health issues, from stomach problems to neurological effects and potential long-term risks.

articles.title: Over 80 mango varieties, 35 jackfruit types on display at Mysuru fest
articles.description: An organic mango and jackfruit festival will be organised from May 29 to 31 at Nexus Centre City Mall in Mysuru with the objective of creating market opportunities for farmers associated with clusters formed under the Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY) implemented by the Horticulture Department.

articles.title: "Strategies For Every Shot" – SRH Captain Pat Cummins Reveals Plans To Tame RR’s Vaibhav Suryavanshi
articles.description: Sunrisers Hyderabad captain Pat Cummins has said that his team has multiple bowling strategies ready for Rajasthan Royals' 15-year-old star, Vaibhav Suryavanshi, in the upcoming IPL Eliminator. Cummins stressed that for explosive players like Vaibhav, you always need a Plan B and even a Plan C.

articles.title: Urban India's record-breaking power demand is expanding heat traps, and it could get worse
articles.description: India’s electricity demand hit a record 270 GW as heatwaves, rising night temperatures and rapid urbanisation fuelled heavy air-conditioner use across cities. Experts warned cooling demand and stress on power grids will continue climbing.

articles.description: Interfaith couple: Madhya Pradesh High Court refused round-the-clock police protection to a Ratlam couple, saying continuous security cannot be granted on general apprehensions without clear proof of an imminent threat or danger to life in MP HC..

articles.description: Wednesday’s ruling, backing tax demands on past transactions, could have major financial implications for the sector. A lawyer representing one of the large gaming companies involved in the dispute said platforms will now have an opportunity to individually respond to the GST department’s show-cause notices.
